ConsentBanner.title: Measurement cookies
ConsentBanner.description: We use Microsoft Clarity to understand how the site is used (heatmaps, anonymous sessions). Without this, For3s flies blind.

Site.title: Brian Aguilar — For3s
Site.description: CEO of agent infrastructure. Founder of For3s — building the layer LATAM needs to operate in the agentic era.
Site.tagline: Opening the doors to the agent era.

Hero.description: Founder of For3s — a new agent infrastructure company, built in collaboration with Frutero Club and Godinez Studio. I connect vision, technology, and community so LATAM can operate in the agentic era.

About.p1: I'm Brian, CEO of For3s — a new agent infrastructure company for AI agents in LATAM. The name comes from Latin: the doors. Every project I build is a door we open together.
About.p2: I don't build features — I build platforms. My focus is the infrastructure layer: agent orchestration, memory systems, and the protocols that make the next generation of software possible.

0.description: A community of builders and founders in LATAM. Frutero Club is the ecosystem where vision is born, ideas get tested, and the people building the future connect.

1.description: A product and development studio. Godinez Studio is the creative engine behind the tools, agents, and digital experiences that bring projects to life.

0.label: Infrastructure
0.desc: I build the foundation others need to scale.

1.label: Community
1.desc: The best products are born from real communities.

2.label: LATAM First
2.desc: I solve problems from and for Latin America.

Projects.headline: Every door I've opened
Projects.subheadline: Initiatives built, planned, and led throughout my journey.

for3s.description: CEO and co-founder. For3s (Latin for 'the doors') is a new company building the infrastructure layer to deploy, orchestrate, and scale AI agents in production — created in collaboration with Frutero Club and Godinez Studio.

godinez-ai.tagline: AI tools for the modern worker
godinez-ai.description: AI tool suite designed for the Latin American worker. Accessible automation, practical prompts, and intelligent workflows for the day-to-day.

kukulcan-brain.tagline: Memory and knowledge system for agents
kukulcan-brain.description: Persistent memory architecture for AI agents. Knowledge-graph based, it lets agents remember context, learn from interactions, and make better decisions.

trustdrop.description: Digital asset transfer protocol with on-chain trust verification. Removes friction and risk from peer-to-peer transactions.

acompanante.description: AI agent designed to keep older adults company. Natural conversation, reminders, family connection, and wellness monitoring.

agentcamp.description: Intensive program for builders who want to build with AI agents. S1-S5 curriculum, expert mentors, and real projects across 5 weeks.

Timeline.headline: The path so far
Timeline.subheadline: A timeline of what I've built, learned, and led.

2026.title: AgentCamp & For3s
2026.description: AgentCamp 2026 launch and For3s consolidation as agent infrastructure for LATAM.

2025.title: Kukulcan Brain
2025.description: Memory architecture for agents kicks off. Deep dive into knowledge graphs and multi-agent systems.

2024.title: Godinez AI & Acompañante
2024.description: Launch of AI tools for the modern worker and an AI companion for older adults.

2023.title: TrustDrop & Web3
2023.description: On-chain transfer protocol. Deep exploration of Web3 and DeFi ecosystems.

2022.title: First steps as a builder
2022.description: Start of the founder journey. First projects, communities, and lessons in technology.

Contact.description: If you're building in the agent era, looking for infrastructure for your team, or just want to connect — write me.

ConnectModal.title: Join the For3s circle
ConnectModal.description: Early access to tools, private betas, and technical content we don't share publicly.
ConnectModal.socialProof: LATAM BUILDERS IN THE AGENTIC ERA
ConnectModal.disclaimer: No spam. We'll only reach out when there's something real to show.

success.title: You're in.
success.description: We'll email you when we open something new. Meanwhile, keep building.
